languages.text: "Солдат подразделения пустотников, верный своему делу слуга Императора. Лорд-капитан, этот юноша борется за жизнь даже сквозь ужасную боль. Если вы позволите установить аугмент, его упорство станет предметом для подражания..."

traits.locale_text: "Солдат элитного подразделения пустотников, флотский штурмовик, его чрезвычайно ценят в отряде, ждут обратно и пророчат карьеру сержанта. Лорд-капитан, этот юноша хочет делать свою работу даже лишившись головы. Если вы позволите установить аугмент..."

languages.text: "A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."
languages.original_text: "Солдат подразделения пустотников, верный своему делу слуга Императора. Лорд-капитан, этот юноша борется за жизнь даже сквозь ужасную боль. Если вы позволите установить аугмент, его упорство станет предметом для подражания..."

traits.locale_text: "A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

"A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

"A soldier from an elite unit of voidsmen, a fleet trooper. He is very highly valued in his squad, who eagerly anticipate his return, and he is prophesied to have a career in command. Lord Captain, this young man wants to do his duty, even if he loses his head. If you allow the augmentation to be installed—

"A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

"A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

languages.text: 「ヴォイドマンの戦闘部隊の兵士にして、皇帝陛下の忠実なしもべです。ロード・キャプテン、この若者は凄まじい苦痛の中ですら、命をかけて闘い続けてきました。もし強化の施術をお許しになれば、彼の不屈さは、他の者たちが見習うべき手本となるでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

traits.locale_text: 「空の精鋭部隊の兵士、艦隊兵。彼の部隊では非常に高く評価されており、彼の帰還を待ち望んでいる。彼は将校としてのキャリアを予言されている。艦長、この若者は、頭が飛んでも任務を遂げたいと思っている。もし、強化手術を許可すれば―
「ヴォイドマンの戦闘部隊の兵士にして、皇帝陛下の忠実なしもべです。ロード・キャプテン、この若者は凄まじい苦痛の中ですら、命をかけて闘い続けてきました。もし強化の施術をお許しになれば、彼の不屈さは、他の者たちが見習うべき手本となるでしょう。」

languages.text: « Un fantassin membre d'une unité d'élite de cosmomarins, et serviteur dévoué de l'Empereur. {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, ce jeune homme se bat pour rester en vie, malgré une douleur insoutenable. Si vous approuvez l'implantation de l'augmentation, sa persévérance deviendra un exemple à suivre pour les autres. »
languages.original_text: "A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

traits.locale_text: « Un fantassin membre d'une unité d'élite de cosmomarins, et serviteur dévoué de l'Empereur. {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, ce jeune homme se bat pour rester en vie, malgré une douleur insoutenable. Si vous approuvez l'implantation de l'augmentation, sa persévérance deviendra un exemple à suivre pour les autres. »

languages.text: "Bir uçsuz eri muharebe biriminden bir asker ve İmparator'un sadık bir hizmetkârı. Lord Kaptan, bu genç adam korkunç bir acı içinde olsa bile hayatı için savaşıyor. Eğer ogmentasyonun takılmasına izin verirseniz azmi, başkalarının örnek alacağı bir emsal olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

traits.locale_text: "Bir uçsuz eri muharebe biriminden bir asker ve İmparator'un sadık bir hizmetkârı. Lord Kaptan, bu genç adam korkunç bir acı içinde olsa bile hayatı için savaşıyor. Eğer ogmentasyonun takılmasına izin verirseniz azmi, başkalarının örnek alacağı bir emsal olacaktır."

languages.text: "Ein Soldat einer Kampfeinheit von Raumfahrern und ein treuer Diener des Imperators. Lord Captain, dieser junge Mann hat trotz seiner entsetzlichen Schmerzen um sein Leben gekämpft. Wenn Ihr die Installation der Augmentation gestattet, wird sein Überleben anderen als Beispiel dienen."
languages.original_text: "A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

traits.locale_text: "Ein Soldat einer Kampfeinheit von Raumfahrern und ein treuer Diener des Imperators. Lord Captain, dieser junge Mann hat trotz seiner entsetzlichen Schmerzen um sein Leben gekämpft. Wenn Ihr die Installation der Augmentation gestattet, wird sein Überleben anderen als Beispiel dienen."

languages.text: «Un soldado de una unidad de infantes del vacío y un fiel sirviente del Emperador. Lord Capitán, este joven ha estado luchando por su vida pese al tremendo dolor que sufre. Si permite que instalemos el aumento, su perseverancia será un ejemplo a seguir para el resto».
languages.original_text: "A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

traits.locale_text: «Un soldado de una unidad de infantes del vacío y un fiel sirviente del Emperador. Lord Capitán, este joven ha estado luchando por su vida pese al tremendo dolor que sufre. Si permite que instalemos el aumento, su perseverancia será un ejemplo a seguir para el resto».

languages.text: “他是一名舰船作战小队的士兵，也是帝皇忠诚的仆从。舰长大人，这个年轻人哪怕承受着极端痛苦，也一直在努力与死亡抗争。如果您允许为他安装植入物，他的坚忍将成为他人效仿的榜样。”
languages.original_text: "A soldier from a voidsman combat unit and a devoted servant of the Emperor. Lord Captain, this young man has been fighting for his life, even through horrendous pain. If you allow the augmentation to be installed, his perseverance will become an example for others to emulate."

traits.locale_text: “他是一名舰船作战小队的士兵，也是帝皇忠诚的仆从。舰长大人，这个年轻人哪怕承受着极端痛苦，也一直在努力与死亡抗争。如果您允许为他安装植入物，他的坚忍将成为他人效仿的榜样。”
